reviews.comment:
Ayer 17/02 a las 19.26hs compré en el servi compras varios art y el monto era $2400 y llegando a mi casa en salta me doy cuenta que me cobraron $4100, pague con tarjeta de débito. No me entregaron ticket o factura, solo el comprobante de la tarjeta. Es una estafa lo que hicieron. Deben estar las cámaras que corroboran lo que lleve, ya que no entregan ticket. La mayoría de las personas que pasa por ahí está de viaje. Ahora no sé dónde hacer el reclamo

(Translated by Google)
Yesterday, February 17th, at 7:26 PM, I bought several items at the convenience store. The total was $2400, but when I got home to Salta, I realized they charged me $4100. I paid with my debit card. They didn't give me a receipt or invoice, only the card statement. It's a scam. There must be security cameras that show what I bought, since they don't give receipts. Most of the people who go through there are traveling. Now I don't know where to file a complaint.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/150634493343004521/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNoMWNLUGZ3EAE

reviews.comment:
Excelente atención y  un reconocimiento a las chicas que nos atendieron por su honestidad y compromiso para con el trabajo. Dejé olvidado mí celular en esa y a través de un llamado informó tal situación y lo resguardo hasta que fuimos a retirar el mismo..las chicas eran del turno mañana del jueves 26 enero.. muchísimas gracias..

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service and a special thanks to the staff for their honesty and dedication. I left my cell phone there, and they called to report it and kept it safe until we picked it up. The staff were on the morning shift on Thursday, January 26th. Thank you so much!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/150634493343004521/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCbmFmVU1nEAE
